title: Croatian Paella with Flaxseed Crostini
description: A Mediterranean-inspired paella dish paired with a crunchy flaxseed crostini.
instructions: Cook the paella according to the package's instructions.
Mix the flaxseed with a pinch of salt and a drizzle of olive oil.
Toast the flaxseed mixture in the oven for 5 minutes.
Prepare the crostini by mixing the flour with a pinch of salt.
Add the jelly to the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and cut into small squares.
Bake the crostini in the oven for 10 minutes.
Serve the paella with the flaxseed crostini on the side.
